name: Easy Raspberry Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Roll out pastry to an 11-inch circle and line a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Trim and flute edges; prick bottom and sides with a fork.
4. Bake for 15 minutes, until golden brown.
5. Cool completely on a wire rack.
6. Beat cream in a small bowl on High until stiff peaks form; set aside.
7. Combine cream cheese and vanilla in a medium bowl; beat until light and fluffy.
8. Blend in raspberry jam, scraping sides of the bowl frequently.
9. Reserve 1/2 cup of whipped cream for garnish; fold remaining whipped cream into the cream cheese mixture until no white streaks remain.
10. Spread evenly into the cooled pie crust.
11. Chill at least 2 hours.
12. Just before serving, spoon reserved whipped cream around the edge of the pie.
13. Garnish with raspberries and fresh mint leaves, if desired.
Nutrition information per slice: 475 calories, 4 gm protein, 33 gm carbohydrate, 37 gm fat, 73% of calories from fat, 112 mg cholesterol, 191 mg sodium, 3/4 diabetic starch/bread exchange, 7-1/4 diabetic fat exchange, 1-1/2 diabetic fruit exchange.
